body:
A snapped garage door cable is a serious issue that requires immediate attention. Because the cables are under immense tension and work directly with the heavy springs, **do not attempt to open, close, or fix the door yourself.** Doing so can cause catastrophic damage to the door or lead to severe personal injury. [Garage Door Cable Snapped - How to Handle the Issue](https://actionoverheaddoor.com/what-to-do-when-your-garage-door-cable-snapped/#:~:text=Use%20a%20vacuum%20with%20a,movements%20can%20threaten%20your%20safety.)[garage door cables snapped? : r/HomeMaintenance - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/HomeMaintenance/comments/1sqzwfk/garage_door_cables_snapped/#:~:text=DeekanKwaz,diy%20unless%20you%20have%20experience.)[garage door cables snapped? : r/HomeMaintenance - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/HomeMaintenance/comments/1sqzwfk/garage_door_cables_snapped/#:~:text=t%20do%20it%3F-,DeekanKwaz,2%20more%20replies)

Here is exactly what you need to do right now, followed by the best local companies to call in Pleasanton.

## Step-by-Step: What to Do Right Now

  * **Step 1: Stop Operating the Door Immediately** Do not try to force the door open or closed, either manually or with your automatic opener. Operating a door with a broken cable places double the stress on the remaining hardware, which can cause the door to crash down or bend out of shape.

  * **Step 2: Clear the Area** Make sure no people, pets, or vehicles are standing near or under the garage door. If your car is trapped inside, leave it there until a professional can safely raise and secure the door.

  * **Step 3: Disconnect the Opener** Pull the red emergency release cord (the one with the dangling handle) to disconnect the automatic opener. This ensures no one accidentally hits a remote button and triggers the motor, which would twist and damage the door panels.

  * **Step 4: Do Not Touch the Springs or Cables** Even if the other cable looks slack, the torsion or extension springs store immense mechanical energy. Leave the system exactly as it is until help arrives.

## Who to Call in Pleasanton, CA

Fortunately, Pleasanton has excellent, highly-rated local overhead door specialists who offer same-day and emergency services to get your door safely closed or repaired. [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=SERVICES%20AND%20PRODUCTS,7%20emergency%20garage%20door%20repairs.)

### 1\. Precision Garage Door Service

  * **Why Them:** They are one of the most trusted names in the Bay Area, utilizing highly trained full-time technicians (never subcontractors). They specialize in snapped cables and broken springs, offer 24/7 emergency repair, and provide a 90-Day "Job Done Right" Guarantee. ### 2\. Valiant Garage Door

  * **Why Them:** Based locally in the Tri-Valley area, Valiant focuses heavily on safety-critical requests like snapped lift cables, off-drum resets, and emergency secure-closes. They have over 12 years of hands-on experience and offer fast, same-day priority dispatch to Pleasanton residents.
